title: Extra shop fees get charged when editing signs
author: codingcat2468
body:
### What is happening?

When "shop creation fees" are enabled in the main `config.yml` *(see below)*, players get charged additional fees when editing a sign, which the plugin does not pay back.
*I hope nobody has reported this yet, and I'm sorry if that's the case, at least I couldn't find a similar open issue!*

Here's an example of such a configuration:
```yaml
# Amount of money player must pay to create a shop
SHOP_CREATION_PRICE: 2
# How much money do you get back when destroying a sign?
SHOP_REFUND_PRICE: 2
```

In this example, for a player using the plugin, this means that they paid 2$ to create a shop, then edited the sign, and got charged 2$ again, even though their shop already existed.

## Code analysis
Since the server I experienced this issue on can't be updated that easily (we're a few builds behind the current dev build), I still wanted to make sure that this bug wasn't patched already,  so I did look at the recent commits and couldn't find anything (even tho [#4fd4148](https://github.com/ChestShop-authors/ChestShop-3/commit/4fd414868cf9ae1fc94e0d57cd12c81ae1f21acf) came really close!)
While I was already in there, I did look at the actual cause of the issue, so I might as well make it easier for you:

`PreShopCreationEvent` is called in `SignCreate` without any checks or additonal data:
https://github.com/ChestShop-authors/ChestShop-3/blob/428ccb8ee52ec8a4bbf556aec408c5b09fd0bd5d/plugin/src/main/java/com/Acrobot/ChestShop/Listeners/Block/SignCreate.java#L76-L77

That event is then directly processed in [`CreationFeeGetter`](https://github.com/ChestShop-authors/ChestShop-3/blob/428ccb8ee52ec8a4bbf556aec408c5b09fd0bd5d/plugin/src/main/java/com/Acrobot/ChestShop/Listeners/PreShopCreation/CreationFeeGetter.java), which means that it runs when a shop is created, but also when it is edited (both are handled by `SignChangeEvent`).

### What did you expect to happen?

The expectation would be that no fees are charged at all for editing a sign (or maybe a config option could be added to configure those, but I'm unsure if that's necessary and/or useful).

This could (for example) be implemented with minimal changes to [`PreShopCreationEvent`](https://github.com/ChestShop-authors/ChestShop-3/blob/428ccb8ee52ec8a4bbf556aec408c5b09fd0bd5d/plugin/src/main/java/com/Acrobot/ChestShop/Events/PreShopCreationEvent.java#L17), like just adding an `edited` field that would be based on this already existing check:

https://github.com/ChestShop-authors/ChestShop-3/blob/428ccb8ee52ec8a4bbf556aec408c5b09fd0bd5d/plugin/src/main/java/com/Acrobot/ChestShop/Listeners/Block/SignCreate.java#L41

And then just using that check in [`CreationFeeGetter`](https://github.com/ChestShop-authors/ChestShop-3/blob/428ccb8ee52ec8a4bbf556aec408c5b09fd0bd5d/plugin/src/main/java/com/Acrobot/ChestShop/Listeners/PreShopCreation/CreationFeeGetter.java) to cancel the event if the user is only editing the sign!

### Plugin Version

3.12.3-SNAPSHOT (build 457)

### Version Check

- [ ] It is the latest development version available from https://ci.minebench.de/job/ChestShop-3/.
- [x] The version [has support](https://github.com/ChestShop-authors/ChestShop-3/security/policy#supported-versions) for this type of issue.

### Plugin Config

(No configuration required here)

### Server Version

This server is running Paper version 26.1.2-72-ver/26.1.2@1a6b910 (2026-06-19T13:08:47Z) (Implementing API version 26.1.2.build.72-stable)

### Server Log

There are no relevant plugin logs in the console.

### What other plugins are you running?

Again, shouldn't be relevant to this issue, but let me know if you want to know more!

### Agreements

- [x] I have checked if there are already similar issues open.
- [x] I have provided all requested information and agree to the terms of the [project's license](https://github.com/ChestShop-authors/ChestShop-3/blob/master/LICENSE), especially the part about no warranty.

### Additional context

_No response_

title: Item IDs are changing each reload/reboot it seems

body:

title: Horrible performance in certain scenarios
author: burdoto
body: Hi, I have noted that ChestShop causes horrible lag in our specific scenario. We are running an [Arclight](https://github.com/IzzelAliz/Arclight) server with our AMPZ Modpack "All the Forge" in v11, and a handful of plugins, including this one. During lag inspection, I keep noticing that hoppers are a big issue, and looking at a profiler it seems like the ItemMoveListener causes high overhead calling the `getHolder()` method; I know too little about ChestShop's code infrastructure to propose an optimized change myself, and I will for now set the "disable" config option; but even then I can see that `getHolder()` is still called at least once every time, still implying at least half of the problematic overhead. https://github.com/ChestShop-authors/ChestShop-3/blob/30578b11033dad45a64ef079b5ee49d9dae2b3b2/plugin/src/main/java/com/Acrobot/ChestShop/Listeners/Item/ItemMoveListener.java#L25

title: Taxes - option to always deduct tax from shop owner
author: PovilasLT
body:
### Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

Currently, if server uses taxes, taxes are always deducted from player receiving money - if player buys item, taxes are deducted from shop owner, and if player sells item to the shop, taxes are deducted from player. In our opinion, shop owner should deal with all taxes.
It would be nice to have more flexibility here - ability to set that taxes are always deducted from shop owner would be nice.

### Describe the solution you'd like

Additional config option, something like `ALWAYS_DEDUCT_TAX_FROM_SHOP_OWNER` should be added. If set to true, when player sells items to shop, instead of deducting tax from player, additional amount of money should be taken from shop owners account.

### Describe alternatives you've considered

_No response_

title: Release automation
author: Phoenix616
body:
### Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

Right now ChestShop is released on the following 5 sites:

- GitHub
- Modrinth
- Hangar
- Spigot
- CurseForge/devBukkit

As the jar should include a value where the plugin was downloaded from for metrics purposes we need to modify the actual jar built on the Jenkins server to set the `Distribution-Type` in the manifest before updating to each platform. This is done completely manually right now which makes the release process time consuming.

### Describe the solution you'd like

A way to both automatically generate the jars with the correct manifest for each platform and (where possible) automatically create a release via the API. (on GitHub, Modrinth and Hangar, the other platforms could auto-provide the link for posting the update)

### Describe alternatives you've considered

Continuing to do it manually

title: Add Event to API for checking if a sign is valid
author: SulkyWhale
body:
### Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

For a ChestShop add-on, as far as I can see, you cannot manipulate whether a sign is valid for ChestShopSign#isValidPreparedSign. It would be great if an event for the API was added that could manipulate the result of that method. 

### Describe the solution you'd like

The event could probably be created and called from ChestShopSign#isValidPreparedSign. It would be useful to have a getter method if the sign has been declared as valid by the existing code called something like isValid() and will return a boolean. It would also require a setter method like setValid(boolean) to set the outcome of the event which is then the outcome that will used in ChestShopSign#isValidPreparedSign to return.

### Describe alternatives you've considered

_No response_

### Agreements

- [x] I have checked if there are already similar issues open.
- [x] I have checked that the [latest build](https://ci.minebench.de/job/ChestShop-3/) doesn't already implement the feature.

### Additional context

I had to make a fork of ChestShop to implement my feature which relies on not using a player name on the first line, and has a different regex pattern. I can't see any way, while making an add-on, to currently get around this.

title: Errors with Chestshop Interactions
author: crumpkatrina
body:
### What is happening?

Chesthop is throwing an error when users attempt to buy/sell items with doublechest shops with a transaction of 100+ when they have special items in inventory.
It "sells" the items to the chestshop owner and the player gets money but if the player doesn't have the items it continues to allow them to sell non-existent items and the user continues to get money.

### What did you expect to happen?

Users are unable to sell items to a player they don't have.
No errors running with transaction size 100+

### Plugin Version

ChestShop v3.12.3-SNAPSHOT (build 429)

### Version Check

- [x] It is the latest development version available from https://ci.minebench.de/job/ChestShop-3/.
